en-US.description:
Wake up to a fresh AI-generated image of a native flower blooming near you today. Every morning, a new picture — matched to your region and the current season. Upgrade to the Premium Pass to unlock unlimited offline semantic searches, the full 7-day history archive, and regional Travel Mode.

### Features
- Offline-first SQLite database resolves regional plants instantly without internet.
- Curated botanical species database featuring native seasonal flora observations.
- Explore botanical common and Latin scientific names.

### Privacy
- Strict zero-data-collection policy caches location code locally.
en-US.promoText: Wake up to your regional bloom ritual. Search your local database offline, explore archives up to 7 days, or travel to other regions. Get 50% off with our Annual Pass, or secure permanent VIP status with our limited-time Founders Edition!
en-US.releaseNotes: Introducing the Specimen Premium Pass! You can now unlock unlimited semantic searches using our offline Vector Vibe Search. We've also added the 7-day archive and regional Travel Mode so you can explore native flowers across all supported regions.
en-US.title: Sandbox Playing Flowers
en-US.subtitle: Daily Native Flower Ritual

review.notes: The app requests location permission once on first launch to resolve the user's US state, Canadian province, or country via reverse-geocoding. The region code is cached locally and the location is never transmitted off-device. Daily flower images are pre-generated server-side via a GitHub Actions cron and served from GitHub Pages — no user data is sent with these requests. Falls back to a default bucket if permission is denied or the user is in an unsupported region.
